languages.text: "Глубоко в корнях есть руины ксеносов. Обычно мы туда не ходим, это проклятое место. Место смерти". {n}Ведка рефлекторно тянет руку к отсутствующему глазу, но тут же ее отдергивает.{/n}

"Deep within the roots are xenos ruins. We do not venture there as a rule. It is a cursed place. A place of death." {n}Vedka's hand reflexively moves toward her missing eye, then she pulls it back.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Глубоко в корнях есть руины ксеносов. Обычно мы туда не ходим, это проклятое место. Место смерти". {n}Ведка рефлекторно тянет руку к отсутствующему глазу, но тут же ее отдергивает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Deep within the roots lie xenos ruins. We do not venture there as a rule. It is a cursed place. A place of death." {n}Vedka's hand reflexively moves toward her missing eye, then she pulls it back.{/n}

"Deep within the roots are xenos ruins. We do not venture there as a rule. It is a cursed place. A place of death." {n}Vedka's hand reflexively moves toward her missing eye, then she pulls it back.{/n}

languages.text: “根系深处有异形遗迹。我们一般不会冒险进去那里。那地方被诅咒了，那是死亡之所。”{n}薇德卡的手下意识地去摸自己缺失的那只眼睛，又迅速收了回来。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Deep within the roots are xenos ruins. We do not venture there as a rule. It is a cursed place. A place of death." {n}Vedka's hand reflexively moves toward her missing eye, then she pulls it back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “根系深处有异形遗迹。我们一般不会冒险进去那里。那地方被诅咒了，那是死亡之所。”{n}薇德卡的手下意识地去摸自己缺失的那只眼睛，又迅速收了回来。{/n}

languages.text: "Köklerin derinliklerinde zeno harabeleri var. Kural olarak oraya gitmeyiz. Lanetli bir yerdir. Orada ölüm kol gezer." {n}Vedka'nın eli, refleks olarak eksik gözüne doğru gidiyor. Sonrasında elini geri çekiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Deep within the roots are xenos ruins. We do not venture there as a rule. It is a cursed place. A place of death." {n}Vedka's hand reflexively moves toward her missing eye, then she pulls it back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Köklerin derinliklerinde zeno harabeleri var. Kural olarak oraya gitmeyiz. Lanetli bir yerdir. Orada ölüm kol gezer." {n}Vedka'nın eli, refleks olarak eksik gözüne doğru gidiyor. Sonrasında elini geri çekiyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Dans les profondeurs des racines se dressent des ruines xénos. Nous avons pour règle de ne pas nous y aventurer, car c'est un endroit maudit où règne la mort. » {n}La main de Vedka se porte instinctivement à l'œil qu'elle a perdu, mais elle la retire tout de suite.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Deep within the roots are xenos ruins. We do not venture there as a rule. It is a cursed place. A place of death." {n}Vedka's hand reflexively moves toward her missing eye, then she pulls it back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Dans les profondeurs des racines se dressent des ruines xénos. Nous avons pour règle de ne pas nous y aventurer, car c'est un endroit maudit où règne la mort. » {n}La main de Vedka se porte instinctivement à l'œil qu'elle a perdu, mais elle la retire tout de suite.{/n}

languages.text: «En lo más profundo de las raíces hay unas ruinas xenos. Nuestras reglas nos prohíben acercarnos. Es un lugar maldito y mortífero». {n}Vedka se lleva automáticamente la mano al ojo que le falta y luego la aparta.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Deep within the roots are xenos ruins. We do not venture there as a rule. It is a cursed place. A place of death." {n}Vedka's hand reflexively moves toward her missing eye, then she pulls it back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «En lo más profundo de las raíces hay unas ruinas xenos. Nuestras reglas nos prohíben acercarnos. Es un lugar maldito y mortífero». {n}Vedka se lleva automáticamente la mano al ojo que le falta y luego la aparta.{/n}

languages.text: "Tief unter den Wurzeln befinden sich Xenosruinen. Wir meiden sie für gewöhnlich. Sie sind verflucht. Ein Ort des Todes." {n}Vedka bewegt ihre Hand reflexartig zu ihrem fehlenden Auge, zieht sie dann aber zurück.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Deep within the roots are xenos ruins. We do not venture there as a rule. It is a cursed place. A place of death." {n}Vedka's hand reflexively moves toward her missing eye, then she pulls it back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Tief unter den Wurzeln befinden sich Xenosruinen. Wir meiden sie für gewöhnlich. Sie sind verflucht. Ein Ort des Todes." {n}Vedka bewegt ihre Hand reflexartig zu ihrem fehlenden Auge, zieht sie dann aber zurück.{/n}

languages.text: 「根の奥には異形の遺跡がある。一般には近づかない。呪われた場所。死の場所。」{n}ヴェドカの手に、欠けた目の場所が反射的に触れられる。そして引き戻される。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Deep within the roots are xenos ruins. We do not venture there as a rule. It is a cursed place. A place of death." {n}Vedka's hand reflexively moves toward her missing eye, then she pulls it back.{/n}
